name: French Mint Cupcakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the chocolate chips and allow them to cool completely.
2. In a large bowl, beat the butter with an electric mixer until light and fluffy.
3. Gradually add the confectioners sugar, beating for 5 minutes until well combined.
4. Add the cooled melted chocolate and continue beating until incorporated.
5. Beat in each egg one at a time, then stir in the vanilla and peppermint extract.
6. Arrange paper holders (cupcake liners) in a muffin tin.
7. Fill each holder about halfway with batter.
8. Sprinkle nuts over the top of each cupcake.
9. Freeze for at least 3 hours before serving. Makes 24 cupcakes.
